description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is primarily white with large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The front of the bungalow opens onto a small patio area with a swimming pool, surrounded by manicured grass and a few palm trees and shrubs. The rear of the building is more private, with fewer windows and a simple, solid wall. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing shade and architectural interest. The property is set on a square plot of green lawn, giving it a spacious and open feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large glass windows, a front patio, and a swimming pool, surrounded by a manicured lawn and palm trees.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, patio, swimming pool, and landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the solid back wall, minimal windows, and the edge of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear and opposite side view focusing on the flat roof, private back area, and the green lawn.
description_view_3: Direct front view showcasing the main entrance, large windows, patio, pool, and symmetrical landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
